jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at BSE
jsonLd.description:
We at BSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About BSE:
BSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE!
